note: Prototype approved tooling policy. Entries define intended controls and must be pinned, mirrored, signed, and attested before production use.

github_actions.name: actions/attest
github_actions.usage: GitHub artifact provenance, SBOM, and custom attestations

github_actions.name: actions/upload-artifact
github_actions.usage: workflow artifact retention for release evidence

github_actions.name: step-security/harden-runner
github_actions.usage: GitHub Actions runtime egress and process monitoring

release_tooling.name: slsa-github-generator
release_tooling.usage: SLSA provenance generation for supported builders

policy: No unpinned third-party GitHub Action references in production overlays.
No long-lived secrets in builds for untrusted upstream code.
Default GitHub token permissions must be read-only unless a job explicitly requires more.
Release signing and attestation jobs must use OIDC/keyless identity where possible.
